items.title: World is ‘extremely turbulent’, Jaishankar calls for deeper India-ASEAN cooperation
items.summary: India-ASEAN agenda covers trade and investment, mobility and talent, tech, digital and AI, green and sustainability, as well as connectivity, Jaishankar said

items.title: More warehouses of Russian online retailer Wildberries hit by Ukraine, officials say
items.summary: Logistics hubs belonging to Wildberries in the Krasnodar and Stavropol regions were struck overnight on Tuesday.
